error_signature: Connection lost error in the editor
title: Connection lost due to WebSocket misconfiguration
symptom: Users experience a 'Connection lost' error in the n8n editor when using SSE or WebSocket. The Docker logs indicate an invalid origin error when SSE is used.
applies_when: Using n8n with traefik as a reverse proxy
Configured to use SSE or WebSocket
not_this_if: WebSocket passthrough is enabled in the WAF
root_cause: The error occurs due to a misconfiguration in the Web Application Firewall (WAF) that blocks WebSocket connections. This misconfiguration prevents n8n from establishing a proper connection when using WebSocket or SSE.
fix_steps: Restart the WAF and n8n services
Test the connection in the n8n editor
agent_instruction: Enable WebSocket passthrough in the WAF configuration to resolve the connection issue.
